channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Pressure Builds On Keir Starmer To Resign As UK Prime Minister

media:content.media:description: If Starmer quits, he will be the sixth prime minister to leave office in the past 10 years.

item.description: Starmer has publicly vowed to stay in office, but pressure is building as more and more Labour Party colleagues conclude that his time is up.
item.content:encoded: Starmer has publicly vowed to stay in office, but pressure is building as more and more Labour Party colleagues conclude that his time is up.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Issues Threat To Iran As Peace Talks Underway

media:content.media:description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates

item.description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

item.title: Florida Man Attempts To Steal Medical Helicopter At Crash Scene He Caused

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: After being cleared medically, Ferrer was taken to Hernando County Detention Center, where he continued resisting deputies during booking.
item.content:encoded: After being cleared medically, Ferrer was taken to Hernando County Detention Center, where he continued resisting deputies during booking.

item.title: JD Vance Names His 2 "Favourite" Indian, Pakistani People. One Is Asim Munir

media:content.media:description: JD Vance names two of his favourite Indian and Pakistani people

item.description: JD Vance made the comments during the US-Iran talks in Switzerland
item.content:encoded: JD Vance made the comments during the US-Iran talks in Switzerland

item.title: After Trump's "Will Hit Harder" Threat, Iran's "Be Careful" Advice

media:content.media:description: "We'll hit Iran very hard again," said Trump.

item.description: "Will Hit Iran Again, Only Harder": Trump While US-Iran Peace Talks Underway
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1116266/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Will Hit Iran Again, Only Harder": Trump While US-Iran Peace Talks Underway

item.title: Jordan Hangs 6 Over "Terrorism", Ending 9-Year Death Penalty Pause

media:content.media:description: Six men have been hanged in Jordan.

item.description: A government spokesperson said more than 100 people remain on death row in Jordan and that executions would proceed "one by one".
item.content:encoded: A government spokesperson said more than 100 people remain on death row in Jordan and that executions would proceed "one by one".

item.title: "Failed Badly": Trump Says UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Will Resign

media:content.media:description: Trump has slammed Starmer for not supporting the US-Israeli war against Iran.

item.description: Trump's post came as British media reported that the embattled Labour Party leader will resign in a matter of days.
item.content:encoded: Trump's post came as British media reported that the embattled Labour Party leader will resign in a matter of days.

item.title: Soldiers Free To Act To 'Eliminate Threats In Lebanon': Israel

media:content.media:description: The Israeli military invaded parts of southern Lebanon.

item.description: Israel said the strikes were a response to projectiles fired by the Iran-backed group at its troops in southern Lebanon, prompting attacks on what an Israeli official described as "Hezbollah targets".
item.content:encoded: Israel said the strikes were a response to projectiles fired by the Iran-backed group at its troops in southern Lebanon, prompting attacks on what an Israeli official described as "Hezbollah targets".

item.title: King Charles To Release Personal Tax Bill, First British Monarch To Do So

media:content.media:description: King Charles's tax information will be shared on Thursday.

item.description: British monarchs are legally exempt from paying certain taxes, though they have paid some duties voluntarily for decades.
item.content:encoded: British monarchs are legally exempt from paying certain taxes, though they have paid some duties voluntarily for decades.

item.title: "Turn Over A New Leaf": US, Iran Begin Negotiating Peace In Switzerland

media:content.media:description: Vance said President Donald Trump remained committed to a full regional ceasefire.

item.description: JD Vance said the goal of the talks was to "turn over a new leaf to transform our relationship with the people of Iran, and to extend an outstretched hand".
item.content:encoded: JD Vance said the goal of the talks was to "turn over a new leaf to transform our relationship with the people of Iran, and to extend an outstretched hand".

item.title: Lebanon Conflict Top Agenda During US Talks In Switzerland: Iran

media:content.media:description: There were no reports of fresh strikes in Lebanon after Saturday evening

item.description: Under the agreement, the Israel-Hezbollah conflict in Lebanon was also due to stop.
item.content:encoded: Under the agreement, the Israel-Hezbollah conflict in Lebanon was also due to stop.

item.title: Won't Seek Nucelar Weapons Or Relinquish Enrichment Rights: Iran President

media:content.media:description: Iran said it had no intention of building an atomic bomb.

item.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian reiterated willing to provide assurances that the country was not seeking a nuclear weapon, while insisting that Iran would not relinquish its right to enrich uranium.
item.content:encoded: President Masoud Pezeshkian reiterated willing to provide assurances that the country was not seeking a nuclear weapon, while insisting that Iran would not relinquish its right to enrich uranium.

item.title: What 25,000 Secret Documents Reveal About Tulsi Gabbard And Her 'Guru'

media:content.media:description: Gabbard was also directly asked in 2019 whether Butler had been her political mentor.

item.description: The memos discussed what policies she should support, what legislation she should introduce, and even how she should present herself during television appearances.
item.content:encoded: The memos discussed what policies she should support, what legislation she should introduce, and even how she should present herself during television appearances.

item.title: Iran Says Won't Enter Into Peace Talks With US Unless Lebanon War Stopped

media:content.media:description: Israel and Lebanon have declared ceasefires but the fighting continues

item.description: The initial deal between US and Iran included the termination of war on all fronts, including Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: The initial deal between US and Iran included the termination of war on all fronts, including Lebanon.

item.title: Paraglider Dangles 60 Metres In Air After Getting Stuck On Crane In China

media:content.media:description: The glider's lines were caught in the jib of the crane.

item.description: The terrifying moment was captured on camera and quickly spread online, highlighting how quickly an adventure flight can turn dangerous.
item.content:encoded: The terrifying moment was captured on camera and quickly spread online, highlighting how quickly an adventure flight can turn dangerous.

item.title: JD Vance, Iranian Officials Arrive In Switzerland To Begin Talks

media:content.media:description: Iran's main focus during negotiations on Sunday will be the ongoing war between Israel and Lebanon.

item.description: The framework was signed last week, and now top US and Iranian negotiators are in a 60-day sprint to reach an agreement on the technical details that hold massive implications for the world economy and global security.
item.content:encoded: The framework was signed last week, and now top US and Iranian negotiators are in a 60-day sprint to reach an agreement on the technical details that hold massive implications for the world economy and global security.

item.title: Malaysia First, China Next: Tarique Rahman Embarks On Debut Foreign Tour

media:content.media:description: After completing his visit to Malaysia, Rahman will travel to China.

item.description: Rahman left Dhaka on a two-day official visit to Malaysia before proceeding to China to attend the 17th Annual Meeting of the New Champions of the World Economic Forum (WEF), popularly known as the Summer Davos Forum.
item.content:encoded: Rahman left Dhaka on a two-day official visit to Malaysia before proceeding to China to attend the 17th Annual Meeting of the New Champions of the World Economic Forum (WEF), popularly known as the Summer Davos Forum.

item.title: Ray-Ban Heir Escalates Fight For Control Of Family's $11.5 Billion Fortune

media:content.media:description: Leonardo Maria Del Vecchio is trying to be the largest shareholder

item.description: Del Vecchio is attempting to buy the combined 25% stakes held by his siblings Luca and Paola in Delfin.
item.content:encoded: Del Vecchio is attempting to buy the combined 25% stakes held by his siblings Luca and Paola in Delfin.

item.title: UK PM Keir Starmer May Quit Next Week, Top Contenders Who Could Replace Him

media:content.media:description: The top contenders who could replace Keir Starmer

item.description: The speculation about his exit has grown after former Greater Manchester mayor Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK's Robert Kenyon by more than 9,000 votes.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1116180/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The speculation about his exit has grown after former Greater Manchester mayor Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK's Robert Kenyon by more than 9,000 votes.

item.title: "F**k. It's Big A** Dog": Video Shows US Cops Shooting Pet After 911 Call

media:content.media:description: The incident occurred on June 13

item.description: The Los Angeles Police Department had received a radio call from a woman who said that her neighbour had been "screaming 'Oh my God' for 20 minutes".
item.content:encoded: The Los Angeles Police Department had received a radio call from a woman who said that her neighbour had been "screaming 'Oh my God' for 20 minutes".
